title: Employment Objectives: Equal Employment Opportunity
description: Conroe ISD is committed to hiring and treating all employees fairly, regardless of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, or other protected characteristics. The district's employment decisions — including hiring, pay, and promotions — are based on qualifications and job-related factors, not personal characteristics. Community members can trust that the district works to maintain a workforce built on equal opportunity and non-discrimination.
